lemon_market_new_listings.description: The vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior and interior show no signs of wear or damage. All mechanical and electronic systems are in perfect working order.
Poor condition.

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a dependable option for daily commuting. Mechanically, the car is sound; the engine starts reliably and the transmission shifts through all gears, though it lacks the smoothness of a newer model. The exterior shows its age with some noticeable paint fading and a few minor dents and scratches. Inside, the upholstery is intact but shows moderate wear and some staining from regular use. All essential electronics and safety features are functional. This is a solid, functional vehicle for anyone needing reliable transportation without the price tag of a newer car.

This vehicle is in fair condition. The engine and transmission are functional but show signs of wear. The exterior has several visible scratches and a few small dents. The interior shows noticeable wear and some staining on the upholstery.

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a functional, reliable option for someone willing to put in a little work. The exterior has some visible wear, including minor scratches and a small dent on the rear passenger door, while the interior shows typical signs of use like slight staining on the carpets. Mechanically, the car starts and runs well, though it is due for a suspension refresh and the air conditioning is not blowing as cold as it used to. It is a solid car that has been driven regularly and is priced fairly for its current state.

Get ready for your next adventure with this budget-friendly and dependable ride! While it displays some character and noticeable wear from its years of service, it’s a hardworking vehicle that still has plenty of life left. This is a great opportunity to own a functional car that gets the job done at a price that won't break the bank!

Presenting a meticulously maintained specimen that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic discipline. This vehicle offers a superior driving experience, featuring a well-preserved interior and a robust powertrain. An ideal acquisition for the discerning driver seeking an optimal balance of performance and long-term value.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a joy to drive. It's in really solid shape and has plenty of life left in it for its next owner. It’s been well-taken care of and runs like a dream—perfect for daily commutes or weekend getaways! Feel free to reach out if you have any questions, I'd love to see it go to a good home!

This F87-chassis performance coupe features the revered N55 3.0L turbocharged inline-six, delivering linear power through a lightning-fast 7-speed dual-clutch transmission. The mechanical limited-slip differential ensures optimal torque vectoring out of apexes, while the factory-tuned suspension maintains excellent lateral stability. Recent service includes a fresh set of high-performance
Used car in good condition. Clean title. Regular maintenance performed. Minor cosmetic wear. Reliable engine. Ready for immediate sale.

This vehicle is a prime example of a well-maintained daily driver that perfectly balances performance with comfort. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, though it shows a few honest signs of the road like minor stone chips on the front fascia and light surface scratches consistent with careful use. Inside, the cabin provides a smoke-free, inviting environment; the premium upholstery remains supple and supportive, showing only light wear on the driver’s side bolster. Every electronic feature, from the responsive infotainment system to the dual-zone climate control, functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, the car is in solid health; the engine pulls smoothly, the transmission shifts are crisp, and it has been serviced regularly with full synthetic oil. With significant tread remaining on the tires and firm braking performance, this car is ready for its next owner to drive away with complete confidence. It offers a dependable and stylish option for those seeking a high-quality pre-owned experience.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies both performance and reliability. This unit offers a sophisticated driving experience, having undergone a rigorous inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. An exceptional opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a premium automotive investment that balances superior quality with remarkable value.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies both reliability and sophistication. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure mechanical excellence and aesthetic preservation. Offering a balanced combination of performance and value, it stands as a premier selection for those seeking a dependable, high-caliber driving experience.

Hey there! I’m super excited to find a new home for my reliable ride. It’s been such a joy to own and is still in great shape, running smoothly and ready for many more adventures. I’ve taken really good care of it, so it’s clean, comfortable, and totally dependable for your daily commute or weekend getaways. You’re going to love how it drives—come check it out!

Offering a driver-focused E46 M3 featuring the legendary S54B32 inline-six engine with individual throttle bodies and Double VANOS. This example has undergone a comprehensive subframe reinforcement and a recent valve clearance adjustment to ensure the valvetrain remains within factory tolerances. Power is delivered through a precise six-speed manual Getrag gearbox to an M Variable Differential Lock, providing exceptional mechanical grip. The suspension geometry is maintained by refreshed bushings and high-pressure gas dampers, preserving the communicative steering feel and chassis balance this platform is known for. The car remains in strong mechanical health, presenting honest patina consistent with a well-enjoyed performance machine.
Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Runs smooth. No mechanical issues.

This 2019 Lexus RX 350 represents a fantastic balance of luxury and long-term reliability. The exterior Atomic Silver paint remains vibrant and glossy, showing only minor, expected road wear such as small stone chips on the hood. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary of comfort; the Parchment leather seats are in great shape with minimal wear on the bolsters, and the genuine wood trim is free of cracks or fading. Every electronic feature, from the heated and ventilated seats to the comprehensive safety suite, operates exactly as intended. Under the hood, the V6 engine runs flawlessly, backed by a complete service history performed exclusively

We are pleased to present this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, representing a premier choice for the discerning driver. This unit has undergone a rigorous inspection to ensure mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. Featuring a clean service history and a robust powertrain, it offers a sophisticated driving experience without compromise. The interior remains remarkably preserved, reflecting a standard of care that distinguishes this offering from the market average. Secure this high-value acquisition today.

Hey there! Looking for a reliable ride that’s been loved and well-taken care of? This beauty is ready for its next adventure! It’s in solid shape, drives smoothly, and has plenty of life left in it. Perfect for daily commutes or weekend getaways. Come check it out—you’re going to love how it feels on the road!

Offering a mechanically sound E92 M3 featuring the high-revving S65B40 naturally aspirated V8 with its signature individual throttle bodies. This example has undergone preventative maintenance including rod bearing replacement and throttle actuator service. The 7-speed M-DCT dual-clutch transmission delivers lightning-fast shifts, paired with a variable M differential lock for optimal traction. The chassis retains its precision with Electronic Damper Control (EDC) and a crisp hydraulic steering rack. Minor aesthetic wear is present, but the powertrain integrity and suspension kinematics remain sharp for the discerning driver.
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Reliable daily driver.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a perfect blend of reliability and performance. Having been garage-kept and regularly serviced, the exterior retains a deep luster with only minor, expected signs of road use. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean, smoke-free, and features well-preserved upholstery. Mechanically, the car is in excellent working order; the engine runs quietly, and the handling is crisp and responsive. It comes with a complete service history and a clean title, making it a dependable choice for anyone seeking a high-quality pre-owned car that has been treated with genuine care.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been super reliable for me. Whether you're commuting or heading out on a weekend trip, this car is ready to hit the road with you! It’s got plenty of life left and is looking for a new owner who will appreciate it as much as I have. Come take it for a spin—you're going to love how it handles!

This E46 M3 is a driver-focused example featuring the legendary S54 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six, delivering 333hp through six individual throttle bodies. It features the desirable Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox paired with a factory limited-slip differential for optimal power delivery. Mechanical integrity is prioritized with documented subframe reinforcement, a recent VANOS overhaul, and rod bearing replacement. The suspension retains its sharp handling characteristics with upgraded bushings and refreshed dampers. While showing honest signs of use consistent with its mileage, the chassis remains rigid and the powertrain pulls strongly to its 8,000 RPM redline. A mechanically sound, high-revving icon ready for the backroads.
Used car in good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Reliable daily driver.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers the perfect balance of performance and reliability. The exterior retains a deep, glossy shine, showing only the minor, expected signs of careful road use. Inside, the cabin is a smoke-free sanctuary with supple seating and fully functional electronics that cater to both driver and passenger comfort. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly, backed by a consistent service history that ensures peace of mind for the miles ahead. The tires have ample tread, and the suspension provides a composed, comfortable ride. Whether you're commuting or heading out on a weekend getaway, this car is turn-key ready and waiting for its next chapter.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, it offers a refined driving experience that balances sophisticated performance with exceptional value. Fully inspected and prepared for immediate delivery, this motorcar stands as a testament to diligent ownership and remains in commendable condition for its class.
